items.title: Former "American Idol" contestant charged in wife's murder in Ohio
items.description: Caleb Flynn, 37, appeared in season 12 of "American Idol." He was arrested by Tipp City police last week and charged with murder, assault and tamperin...

items.title: Storms threaten to pummel East Coast as blizzard warnings issued
items.description: Blizzard warnings were issued Saturday for New York City, New Jersey and coastal communities along the East Coast.

items.title: Team USA captures record-breaking 11th gold medal at Winter Games
items.description: Team USA could add more gold medals to its tally, including on Sunday when the U.S. men's hockey team takes on Team Canada.

items.title: Jordan Stolz is 4th in the last Olympic speedskating race after winning gold
items.description: U.S. speedskater Jordan Stolz finished fourth in his last race after winning two golds and a silver.

items.title: Which countries and athletes have the most Olympic medals of all time?
